sourcesContent:
// ============================================================
// 3SIXTY PRODUCT & SERVICE DATA
// Based on actual product literature
// ============================================================

export const categories = [
  { id: 'outdoor-branding', name: 'Outdoor Branding', icon: '🏕️', image: '/images/services/outdoor-branding.jpg', description: 'Gazebos, flags, banners & outdoor display solutions' },
  { id: 'indoor-branding', name: 'Indoor Branding', icon: '🏢', image: '/images/services/indoor-branding.jpg', description: 'Pull-up banners, banner walls, table cloths & display boards' },
  { id: 'signage', name: 'Signage', icon: '🪧', image: '/images/services/signage.jpg', description: 'Indoor and outdoor signage solutions' },
  { id: 'vehicle-branding', name: 'Vehicle Branding', icon: '🚗', image: '/images/services/vehicle-branding.jpg', description: 'Full wraps, partial wraps & fleet branding' },
  { id: 'digital-printing', name: 'Digital & Large Format Printing', icon: '🖨️', image: '/images/services/digital-printing.jpg', description: 'Brochures, flyers, wallpaper & large format prints' },
  { id: 'graphic-design', name: 'Graphic Design', icon: '🎨', image: '/images/services/graphic-design.jpg', description: 'Logo design, branding & corporate identity' },
  { id: 'dtf-embroidery', name: 'DTF, Embroidery & Fabric Printing', icon: '🧵', image: '/images/services/dtf-embroidery.jpg', description: 'DTF transfers, embroidery & sublimation on fabric' },
  { id: 'laser-cutting', name: 'Laser Cutting', icon: '✂️', image: '/images/services/laser-cutting.jpg', description: 'Precision laser cutting & engraving services' },
  { id: 'custom-branded', name: 'Custom Branded Products', icon: '🎁', image: '/images/services/custom-branded.jpg', description: 'Branded pens, mugs, apparel & corporate gifts' },
  { id: 'expo-events', name: 'Expo & Event Branding', icon: '🎪', image: '/images/services/expo-event.jpg', description: 'Exhibition stands, event setups & display combos' },
];

export const products = [
  // OUTDOOR BRANDING
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'Teardrop Banner',
    category: 'outdoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-OB-001',
    image: '/images/products/outdoor/teardrop.png',
    description: 'One of the most popular branding solutions thanks to its high visibility, easy setup, and compact portability. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor activations.',
    features: ['High visibility with large print area', 'Rust-free ground spikes', 'Swivel system for wind rotation', 'Tension system keeps fabric tight', 'Double-sided option available', 'Compact & portable with carry bag'],
    specs: { weight: '1.4kg', size: '0.98m (W) x 2.24m (H)', poles: '2 x aluminium poles (2m assembled)', material: 'Polyester warp knit, anti-fray', accessories: '2 x fibreglass rods, 1 x steel ground spike', bag: 'Polyester oxford (137 x 18cm)' },
    usage: 'Indoor & Outdoor',
    price: 1250,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'Sharkfin Banner',
    category: 'outdoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-OB-002',
    image: '/images/products/outdoor/sharkfin-banner.png',
    description: 'Standing at over 4 metres high, the Sharkfin Banner delivers a striking visual presence while remaining lightweight and portable. One of the most popular outdoor branding solutions.',
    features: ['Over 4m height for maximum brand impact', 'Lightweight and portable', 'Strong aluminium construction', 'Choice of bases for various surfaces (sold separately)', 'Wind resistant up to 13–18kph'],
    specs: { height: 'Over 4m', frame: 'Aluminium', bases: 'Ground stake, drive-on car foot, or base foot with weighting ring (sold separately)' },
    usage: 'Indoor & Outdoor',
    price: 1450,
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'Pop-Up Horizontal Banner',
    category: 'outdoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-OB-003',
    image: '/images/products/outdoor/popup-banner.png',
    description: 'Quick, cost-effective and high-impact branding solution. Pops up in seconds with a fully sprung frame. Ideal for sports fields, outdoor events, exhibitions and promotions.',
    features: ['Pops up in seconds – no tools needed', 'Double-sided skins included', 'Crease-resistant polyester fabric', 'Inside-sewn pouches for sand/weights', '4 steel ground spikes included', 'Compact twist-fold carry bag'],
    specs: { weight: '3.2kg', size: '2m (W) x 1m (H) x 0.4m (D)', printArea: '1.98m x 0.9m', frame: 'Fibre rod, fully sprung', fabric: 'Polyester display fabric', bag: 'Polyester oxford, 85cm diameter' },
    usage: 'Outdoor',
    price: 1350,
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: 'Steel Sublimated Gazebo – 3m x 3m',
    category: 'outdoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-OB-004',
    image: '/images/products/outdoor/gazebo.png',
    description: 'Delivers the perfect blend of brand impact, strength and practicality. Quick pop-up assembly with vibrant full-colour sublimation printing on water-resistant polyester.',
    features: ['Quick pop-up design – no tools needed', 'Coated steel frame with hexagonal legs', 'Water-resistant polyester canopy', 'Full sublimated print', 'Optional double-sided printing', 'Carry bag included'],
    specs: { weight: '19.4kg', size: '3m x 3m', frame: 'Coated steel with hexagonal legs', fabric: 'Water-resistant polyester', bag: 'Polyester oxford with webbing handles' },
    usage: 'Outdoor',
    price: 4950,
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: 'A-Frame Banner',
    category: 'outdoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-OB-005',
    image: '/images/products/outdoor/a-frame-banner.png',
    description: 'Versatile, portable branding solution for maximum impact. Perfect for golf days, sports fields, festivals, and beach events. Fully sprung design with 2 PVC skins included.',
    features: ['Landscape display option', 'Larger branding area than oval systems', 'Lightweight at just 3.2kg', 'Strong aluminium frame with PVC skins', '2 x A-Frame skins included', 'Carry bag included'],
    specs: { weight: '3.2kg', size: '2m (W) x 1m (H) x 1m (D)', printArea: '1.95m (W) x 0.95m (H)', frame: 'Aluminium, folds flat', material: 'PVC', bag: 'Polyester oxford, 129 x 23cm' },
    usage: 'Indoor & Outdoor',
    price: 1350,
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: "Coated Steel Director's Chair",
    category: 'outdoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-OB-006',
    image: '/images/products/outdoor/director-chair.png',
    description: 'Versatile and durable chair built for comfort and brand visibility. Padded seating with removable branded backrest – seating that doubles as a branding opportunity.',
    features: ['Powder-coated steel frame', 'Padded backrest, seat and arms', 'Portable & foldable', 'Removable branded backrest', 'Easy screw system for backrest replacement', 'Digital dye sublimation print'],
    specs: { weight: '3.39kg', folded: '77cm (H) x 84cm (W) x 14cm (D)', backrest: '62cm x 18cm', seat: '49cm x 32cm', frame: 'Powder-coated steel', fabric: 'Black Oxford fabric' },
    usage: 'Indoor & Outdoor',
    price: 1650,
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: 'Telescopic Banner',
    category: 'outdoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-OB-007',
    image: '/images/products/outdoor/telescopic-banner.png',
    description: 'Adjustable height telescopic banner for versatile outdoor and indoor branding applications.',
    features: ['Adjustable height', 'Portable design', 'Easy setup'],
    specs: {},
    usage: 'Indoor & Outdoor',
    price: 1150,
  },

  // INDOOR BRANDING
  {
    id: 8,
    name: 'Economy Pull-Up Banner',
    category: 'indoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-IB-001',
    image: '/images/products/indoor/economy-pullup.png',
    description: 'The go-to display solution for decades. Lightweight, portable, and easy to set up in seconds. Simply slide the banner up from the base and your display is ready.',
    features: ['Portable & lightweight (4.5kg)', 'Slides up in seconds', 'Cost-effective', 'Fabric or Non Curl PVC options', 'Over-the-shoulder carry bag included', 'Indoor use only'],
    specs: { weight: '4.5kg', size: '0.85m (W) x 2m (H) x 0.1m (D)', printArea: '0.85m (W) x 2m (H)', frame: 'Aluminium', bag: '90 x 12 x 13cm' },
    usage: 'Indoor',
    price: 850,
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    name: 'Executive Pull-Up Banner',
    category: 'indoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-IB-002',
    image: '/images/products/indoor/executive-pullup.png',
    description: 'When first impressions matter. Premium banner with sturdy, professional finish and upgraded materials. Layflat PVC prevents curling at the edges.',
    features: ['Premium quality finish', 'Sturdy aluminium frame with wider base', 'Layflat PVC – no curling', 'Pulls up in seconds', 'High-quality carry bag included', 'Reskinnable – reusable hardware'],
    specs: { weight: '5kg', size: '0.85m (W) x 2m (H) x 0.2m (D)', printArea: '0.85m (W) x 2m (H)', frame: 'Aluminium', material: 'Layflat PVC', bag: '92 x 10 x 21cm' },
    usage: 'Indoor',
    price: 1250,
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    name: 'X-Frame Banner',
    category: 'indoor-branding',
    sku: '3S-IB-003',
